note: Purchased — ice_age opens at First Temple, so Influence can be ground from here on. Pool is the Stone Age set + Göbekli Tepe (the Forge is this mission's own reward). Works-leaning on purpose: the Failing Stone Tools threat drains 1🔨 per round per worker staffed in a *building*, and work cards are exempt, so Foraging/Toolmaking/Storytelling carry the economy and Huts (workers: 0) add population without feeding the drain.
